_comment: SessionStart hook that fires the nexus cold-boot recovery trigger when the orchestrator session is brought back (matcher 'resume' covers `claude --resume` AND `claude --continue` — the chaperon's bring-back path at boot). Merge the `hooks` block below into your orchestrator's settings.json under $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (do NOT replace an existing `hooks` object — splice SessionStart into it). Replace the absolute path with your own NEXUS_ROOT if it differs. `async: true` keeps the hook from blocking session start; boot-recover.sh additionally backgrounds the heavy recovery, so it returns within milliseconds regardless. See monitor/README.md -> 'Cold-boot recovery trigger'.
